header.title: Château de La Roche (Saint-Priest-la-Roche).jpg
header.description: The Château de La Roche is a restored castle situated in the commune of Saint-Priest-la-Roche in the Loire département of France, 20 km from Roanne. The castle stands on an island in the lake formed by the Villerest dam.
header.author: Anthony Morel

header.title: Château de La Roche (Saint-Priest-la-Roche) (2).jpg
header.description: The Château de La Roche is a restored castle situated in the commune of Saint-Priest-la-Roche in the Loire département of France, 20 km from Roanne. The castle stands on an island in the lake formed by the Villerest dam.
header.author: Anthony Morel

photos.title: 17-La-Roche-Courbon-terrasse.jpg
photos.description:
This building is classé au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA00105221 .
